query: SELECT id, name, slug, overview, atoll, published, featured, createdAt, updatedAt FROM island_guides WHERE name = 'Maaya Thila';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3FFv3TtDUeNbYDM.root --database JUCCYykxYWxAcNny3wop55 --execute SELECT id, name, slug, overview, atoll, published, featured, createdAt, updatedAt FROM island_guides WHERE name = 'Maaya Thila';

rows.name: Maaya Thila
rows.overview: Maaya Thila is a world-class dive site featuring dramatic underwater topography with vertical walls and overhangs. Known for encounters with large pelagic species including sharks and rays. Strong currents make it suitable for experienced divers.
